## Investment View
FRT scores 56/100 as a mixed_watch setup. The score is driven mainly by the technical breakout picture, with 10 constructive versus 2 adverse stock-specific signals and a market overlay impact of 0 supportive versus 7 adverse effects.

- Thesis: The setup is still mixed and needs cleaner confirmation from price action, stock-specific flow, or a more favorable market overlay before it becomes a stronger breakout candidate.

## What Matters
- Price is holding above the prior 20-day high (108.54), a basic breakout confirmation signal. (high)
- Volume anomaly is strong at 2.17, which supports the move. (high)

## Risks / Invalidation
- A close back below 108.54 would weaken or invalidate the current breakout picture. (high)
- The name is still only a candidate in the source feed, so the setup is not fully confirmed yet. (medium)
